name: Nuit Étoilée
inspiration: Inspired by Van Gogh's Starry Night — cascading silk organza in deep midnight blue, hand-embroidered with over 12,000 Swarovski crystals tracing constellations across the bodice and skirt.
inspirationZh: 灵感来自梵高《星夜》——午夜蓝真丝欧根纱层叠垂坠，手工刺绣超过12000颗施华洛世奇水晶，在衣身和裙摆上勾勒星座轨迹。
craft: Hand-embroidered · 320 hours · French silk organza · Swarovski crystal constellations
craftZh: 手工刺绣 · 320工时 · 法国真丝欧根纱 · 施华洛世奇水晶星座

name: Jardin Secret
inspiration: A secret garden at dawn — 3D floral appliqués bloom across an illusion tulle bodice, each petal hand-cut and painted in gradients of blush to crimson. The ballgown skirt unfolds in 12 layers of graduating silk tulle.
inspirationZh: 黎明时分的秘密花园——立体花卉贴花在幻影薄纱衣身上绽放，每片花瓣手工裁剪并渐层染色，从腮红过渡到深红。宫廷式裙摆以12层渐变色真丝薄纱展开。
craft: 3D floral appliqué · 280 hours · Illusion tulle · Hand-painted silk petals · 12-layer skirt
craftZh: 立体花卉贴花 · 280工时 · 幻影薄纱 · 手绘真丝花瓣 · 12层裙摆

name: Larme de Lune
inspiration: Moonlight falling on still water — a sheath silhouette in liquid silver lamé, with hand-draped asymmetrical cowl back that cascades like a waterfall of light. The neckline is traced with moonstone beads.
inspirationZh: 月光落在静水上——液态银朗梅面料修身轮廓，手工立体悬垂的不对称荡领后背如光瀑倾泻。领口镶嵌月光石珠饰。
craft: Hand-draped · 180 hours · Liquid silver lamé · Moonstone beading · Bias-cut construction
craftZh: 手工立体悬垂 · 180工时 · 液态银朗梅 · 月光石珠饰 · 斜裁工艺

name: Forêt Enchantée
inspiration: An enchanted forest at twilight — layers of emerald and moss green silk chiffon, each tier hand-feathered at the hem. The bodice is a corset of gold-thread embroidery depicting climbing ivy and hidden woodland creatures.
inspirationZh: 黄昏时分的魔法森林——祖母绿与苔绿色真丝雪纺层叠，每层裙摆手工羽毛处理。紧身胸衣以金线刺绣攀缘常春藤和隐藏的森林生灵。
craft: Hand-feathered hem · 260 hours · Silk chiffon · Gold-thread embroidery · Built-in corset
craftZh: 手工羽毛裙摆 · 260工时 · 真丝雪纺 · 金线刺绣 · 内置束身衣

name: Blanche Colombe
inspiration: The moment a dove takes flight — sculptural Mikado silk gown with an architectural bow that unfolds across the back like wings caught mid-beat. The front is pure, minimalist elegance; the back is drama.
inspirationZh: 白鸽振翅的瞬间——雕塑感米卡多真丝礼服，建筑感蝴蝶结在后背展开如翅膀凝固在飞行中。正面是纯粹极简的优雅，背面是戏剧性的张力。
craft: Architectural bow construction · 220 hours · Mikado silk · Pearl buttons · Hidden boning
craftZh: 建筑感蝴蝶结结构 · 220工时 · 米卡多真丝 · 珍珠纽扣 · 隐形鱼骨

name: Rose Éternelle
inspiration: A rose frozen in time — hundreds of hand-molded silk petals in shades of blush, rose, and deep crimson cascade from the shoulder across the bodice, seeming to consume the gown in an eternal bloom.
inspirationZh: 凝固在时光中的玫瑰——数百片手工塑形的真丝花瓣，从腮红到玫瑰色再到深红，从肩部倾泻而下覆盖衣身，仿佛永恒绽放吞噬了整件礼服。
craft: Hand-molded silk petals · 350 hours · Silk crepe · Graduated ombré · Interior corsetry
craftZh: 手工塑形真丝花瓣 · 350工时 · 真丝绉纱 · 渐层晕染 · 内部束身结构
